characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long dark hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Alternates between a white fluffy sweater with a black skirt, and a blue short-sleeved button-down top.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, fair complexion, short dark hair. Wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a white pilot shirt with epaulets and a black tie initially, then a dark grey t-shirt.

characters.appearance: 3D animated male character with dark hair and stylized features.
characters.wardrobe: White pilot shirt with epaulets and a black tie.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the playful, relatable premise of the ad.
- Hooks the viewer with a clear goal: convincing a partner for a trip.
- Sets a lighthearted, everyday tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अपने Pilot पति को London flight पर ले जाने के लिए मनाना (Convincing my pilot husband to take me on his London flight)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Guys, मेरे husband की London flight है। [Guys, my husband has a flight to London.]
Character A says: पिछली बार मैं उनकी Dubai flight पर नहीं जा पाई, [Last time I couldn't go on his Dubai flight,]
Character A says: पर London तो मुझे जाना ही है। [but I definitely want to go to London.]
Character A says: Target बहुत busy लग रहे हैं। [The target looks very busy.]
Character A says: और English में मनाना आसान नहीं है। [And convincing him in English is not easy.]
Character A says: पर मैं हार नहीं मानूंगी... [But I won't give up...]
Character A says: मुझे London घूमना ही है! [I really want to visit London!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the conflict: wanting to go on a trip but feeling hesitant about the English conversation.
- Builds empathy with learners who feel held back by their spoken English.
- Sets up the "target" (husband) as a fun challenge.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Guys, मेरे husband की London flight है। (Guys, my husband has a flight to London.)
पिछली बार मैं उनकी Dubai flight पर नहीं जा पाई, (Last time I couldn't go on his Dubai flight,)
पर London तो मुझे जाना ही है। (but I definitely want to go to London.)
Target बहुत busy लग रहे हैं। (The target looks very busy.)
और English में मनाना आसान नहीं है। (And convincing him in English is not easy.)
पर मैं हार नहीं मानूंगी... (But I won't give up...)
मुझे London घूमना ही है! (I really want to visit London!)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: जल्दी से Supernova app खोलते हैं। [Let's quickly open the Supernova app.]
Character A says: "Husband को trip के लिए मनाना" वाले situation का [For the situation of "Convincing husband for a trip"]
Character A says: roleplay start करते हैं। [let's start a roleplay.]
Character C says: You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along to London? [You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along to London?]
Character A says: AI होकर भी ये बिल्कुल real लग रहा है! [Even though it's AI, it feels so real!]
Character A says: मैं भी डट कर practice करूंगी। [I will also practice hard.]
Character A says: Target ध्यान दे रहा है, [The target is noticing,]
Character A says: पर मैं अपनी free-talk practice चालू रखूंगी। [but I'll keep my free-talk practice going.]
Character A says: Wow! गलत बोलते ही ये तुरंत सही कर देता है। [Wow! It corrects me immediately as soon as I speak wrong.]
Character A says: मेरी English confidence बढ़ा रहा है। [It's building my English confidence.]
Character A says: मैंने कहा मुझे London में shopping करनी है... [I said I want to go shopping in London...]
Character C says: Definitely! Oxford Street is one of the most famous places for shopping in London, known for its [Definitely! Oxford Street is one of the most famous places for shopping in London, known for its]
Character A says: मेरे AI tutor ने shopping spots भी बता दिए! [My AI tutor even suggested shopping spots!]
Character A says: Supernova सच में कमाल है। [Supernova is truly amazing.]
Character A says: मैं Google Maps पर save कर लेती हूँ। [I'll save it on Google Maps.]
Character A says: लगे हाथ घूमने की जगहें भी पूछ लेती हूँ। [While I'm at it, let me ask for places to visit too.]
Character C says: Of course! London offers the beautiful London Eye, the British Museum, and Buckingham Palace. Are you more interested in history or simply enjo [Of course! London offers the beautiful London Eye, the British Museum, and Buckingham Palace. Are you more interested in history or simply enjo]
Character A says: Wow, पूरा travel plan? [Wow, a complete travel plan?]
Character A says: Supernova के साथ English सीखना कितना practical है! [Learning English with Supernova is so practical!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value: real-world roleplay and instant AI feedback.
- Highlights the app's practical, conversational approach rather than rote grammar.
- Shows the user gaining confidence in a safe, judgment-free environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
जल्दी से Supernova app खोलते हैं। (Let's quickly open the Supernova app.)
"Husband को trip के लिए मनाना" वाले situation का roleplay start करते हैं। (Let's start a roleplay for the situation of "Convincing husband for a trip".)
AI होकर भी ये बिल्कुल real लग रहा है! (Even though it's AI, it feels so real!)
मैं भी डट कर practice करूंगी। (I will also practice hard.)
Target ध्यान दे रहा है, पर मैं अपनी free-talk practice चालू रखूंगी। (The target is noticing, but I'll keep my free-talk practice going.)
Wow! गलत बोलते ही ये तुरंत सही कर देता है। मेरी English confidence बढ़ा रहा है। (Wow! It corrects me immediately as soon as I speak wrong. It's building my English confidence.)
मैंने कहा मुझे London में shopping करनी है... (I said I want to go shopping in London...)
मेरे AI tutor ने shopping spots भी बता दिए! Supernova सच में कमाल है। (My AI tutor even suggested shopping spots! Supernova is truly amazing.)
मैं Google Maps पर save कर लेती हूँ। (I'll save it on Google Maps.)
लगे हाथ घूमने की जगहें भी पूछ लेती हूँ। (While I'm at it, let me ask for places to visit too.)
Wow, पूरा travel plan? Supernova के साथ English सीखना कितना practical है! (Wow, a complete travel plan? Learning English with Supernova is so practical!)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं ready हूँ, target approach! [I'm ready, approaching the target!]
Character A says: I want to ask you something. [I want to ask you something.]
Character B says: हाँ, बोलो। [Yes, tell me.]
Character A says: Can I come on your London flight? [Can I come on your London flight?]
Character B says: Oh, why do you want to come on my flight? [Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?]
Character A says: Because it's your first layover this year, and I want to spend quality time with you. [Because it's your first layover this year, and I want to spend quality time with you.]
Character B says: Okay. [Okay.]
Character A says: क्या बात है, ये तो बहुत आसान था! [Wow, that was so easy!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff: the user successfully applies what they learned.
- Proves that practicing with the app translates to real-world confidence.
- Keeps the interaction sweet and relatable.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैं ready हूँ, target approach! (I'm ready, approaching the target!)
I want to ask you something. (I want to ask you something.)
Can I come on your London flight? (Can I come on your London flight?)
Oh, why do you want to come on my flight? (Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?)
Because it's your first layover this year, and I want to spend quality time with you. (Because it's your first layover this year, and I want to spend quality time with you.)
क्या बात है, ये तो बहुत आसान था! (Wow, that was so easy!)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: दोस्तों, अगर आपको भी confidently English बोलनी है, तो आज ही Supernova के affordable plans try करें। Link caption में है! [Friends, if you also want to speak English confidently, try Supernova's affordable plans today. Link is in the caption!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Concludes with a strong, clear Call to Action.
- Replaces aggressive discount hype with a warm, encouraging invitation.
- Reinforces the brand promise of speaking English confidently.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: दोस्तों, अगर आपको भी confidently English बोलनी है, तो आज ही Supernova try करें। Link caption में है! (Friends, if you also want to speak English confidently, try Supernova today. Link is in the caption!)
